title: KR Normalized Package
description: Schema for the normalized package — the output of the normalization engine (محرك التطبيع) consumed by the passaging engine (محرك التقطيع). This is the NORMALIZATION BOUNDARY (حد التطبيع) schema: the single most important architectural contract in the application. Everything above this boundary is source-format-specific; everything below is source-agnostic. The normalized package is a COMPOSITE of two artifacts: a manifest (single JSON document) and a pages stream (JSONL, one page record per line).

manifest.title: Normalized Package Manifest
manifest.description: Single JSON document containing metadata, structural divisions, and normalization provenance. Stored as normalized_package_manifest.json alongside the pages JSONL.

schema_version.description: Schema version identifier for the normalized package format.

book_id.description: Canonical source identifier, matching the source_metadata book_id.

metadata.description: Source metadata reference — carries the source-agnostic identity and science scope information needed by Phase 2 engines without requiring them to access source_metadata directly.

science_scope.description: Science identifiers this source is relevant to. Flows through the pipeline per §7.3.

scholarly_context.description: Author scholarly context for attribution. Passed through for downstream enrichment.

divisions.description: Flat list of structural division nodes discovered during normalization. Hierarchy expressed via parent_id references, ordered by start_seq_index (document order). Adapted from ABD divisions_schema_v0.1.

structure_confidence.description: Overall confidence in the discovered structure. high: most divisions are reliably detected. medium: mix of reliable and uncertain. low: mostly uncertain. minimal: near-zero structure found.

total_pages.description: Total number of page records in the accompanying JSONL file.

normalization_tool.description: Identifier of the normalizer that produced this package (e.g., 'kr.normalization.shamela_normalizer').

normalization_utc.description: UTC timestamp of when normalization was performed.

toc_detected.description: Whether a table of contents was detected in the source.

total_divisions.description: Total number of division nodes in the tree (excluding root).

notes.description: Optional free-text notes about the normalization run.

division_node.title: Division Node
division_node.description: A structural division in the source — a named section as intended by the author or editor. Source-agnostic representation of the source's internal organizational hierarchy.

id.description: Auto-generated unique identifier within this package. Format: div_NNNN.

type.description: Structural keyword type (e.g., باب, فصل, مبحث) or 'implicit' for divisions with no keyword, 'volume' for volume markers, 'root' for the book root node.

title.description: Full heading text as it appears in the source. For implicit divisions, a descriptive title.

level.description: Hierarchy depth. 0 = root, 1 = top-level division, etc.

detection_method.description: How this division was discovered during normalization.

confidence.description: Confidence level of the division detection.

digestible.description: Whether this division contains content suitable for extraction. 'true' = teaching/exercise content. 'false' = non-content (TOC, endorsements). 'uncertain' = needs human decision.

content_type.description: Content classification. null if not yet classified.

start_seq_index.description: seq_index of the first page (inclusive). Authoritative page reference.

page_hint_start.description: Human-readable start page reference (e.g., 'ص:١٩'). Display only — Phase 2 engines MUST use seq_index.

page_hint_end.description: Human-readable end page reference. Display only.

parent_id.description: ID of the enclosing division. null for top-level divisions.

child_ids.description: IDs of direct children in document order. Empty for leaf divisions.

ordinal.description: Ordinal number if heading contains one (الأول=1, etc.). null if none.

editor_inserted.description: True if this heading was inserted by an editor, not the original author.

detection_notes.description: Free-text notes from the detection pass. Null for straightforward detections.

page_record.title: Normalized Page Record
page_record.description: A single normalized page in the JSONL stream. One record per line in normalized_pages.jsonl. All source-format-specific fields have been stripped by the normalizer — only source-agnostic content remains.

schema_version.description: Schema version of this page record format.

seq_index.description: Zero-based sequential page index. THE authoritative page positioning identifier — Phase 2 engines MUST use seq_index for all page references, never page_number_int or page_number_arabic.

volume.description: Volume number for multi-volume sources. null for single-volume.

page_number_arabic.description: Arabic-numeral page number from the printed edition. Optional, display-only. Phase 2 engines MUST NOT use this for positioning — use seq_index instead.

page_number_int.description: Integer page number from the printed edition. Optional, display-only. Phase 2 engines MUST NOT use this for positioning — use seq_index instead.

matn_text.description: The main text content of this page, cleaned of all source-format-specific markup. This is the primary content that downstream engines process.

footnotes.description: Array of footnotes on this page, separated from main text by the normalizer.

footnote_ref_numbers.description: Footnote reference markers found in the main text of this page.

footnote_preamble.description: Any preamble text before the footnotes section. Empty string if none.

has_verse.description: Whether this page contains poetry verse (شعر).

has_table.description: Whether this page contains tabular content.

warnings.description: Normalization warnings for this page (e.g., encoding issues, unusual formatting). Empty if clean.
